overall.description: Gameplay footage from a narrative adventure game showing a character exploring the interior cargo hold and captain's quarters of a medieval sailing ship, walking the sunlit deck, and transitioning to a cinematic view of two characters approaching the vessel by rowboat in a bright coastal setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ship cargo hold with storage nets and barrels

events.description: character begins climbing the wooden ladder to the upper deck

agents.ego_description: walking around the dimly lit cargo hold examining ropes, barrels, and cargo netting

entered.detail: tall wooden ladder leading up to the deck
rope netting covering stacked goods on the walls
thick coils of rope piled on the floor
wooden storage barrel with metal bands
large brass cooking pot sitting on a barrel
wooden shelf with various items against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores a narrow, dimly lit wooden cargo hold filled with rope coils, barrels, and cargo netting. Light filters through lattice openings overhead as she walks around the confined space before approaching and climbing a wooden ladder.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ship deck with rigging and ocean views

events.description: character climbs ladder and emerges onto the sunlit ship deck
character enters the captain's quarters through a wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along the ship deck and looking out at the ocean while heading toward the cabin

notable_agents.action: crew member standing near the ship railing looking out to sea

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the ship's main deck
wooden railing with red trim along the ship's edge
blue ocean water with gentle waves extending to the horizon
tall wooden mast with rigging and flags
wooden stairs leading up to a higher deck level
doorway leading into the ship's interior cabin

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the bright sunlit deck, the character walks along the wooden planks past coiled ropes and railings, with the open ocean visible beyond. A crew member stands near the railing as she approaches a doorway leading to an interior cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship captain's quarters with bed and storage shelves

events.description: character turns and walks back toward the doorway after exploring the room

agents.ego_description: examining the captain's quarters, looking at the bed and shelves, then moving toward the doorway

entered.detail: wooden bed frame with red fabric canopy and curtains
tall wooden shelves holding scrolls and pottery
small lattice window allowing light to stream through
open doorway leading back to the ship deck
ropes and chains hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: Inside the captain's quarters, sunlight streams through lattice windows illuminating a bed with red curtains and wooden shelves filled with scrolls. The character explores the room, examining the furnishings before turning back toward the doorway with a view of the deck and ocean beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with rocky shoreline

events.description: scene cuts to exterior view of two characters in a rowboat approaching the ship

agents.ego_description: standing in a small rowboat holding the child's hand and looking up at the large ship

notable_agents.action: young boy with red flower crown standing in the boat looking up at the ship

entered.detail: the large medieval sailing ship viewed from the water
white rocky cliffs and shoreline in the background
small wooden rowboat carrying the two characters

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a cinematic view of two characters standing in a small rowboat on turquoise coastal waters, looking up at the large wooden ship anchored near a rocky shoreline under a bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic depths of a ship's hold to a wide, cinematic view of the vessel from the open sea. It begins in a dimly lit wooden cargo hold filled with barrels and rope coils, moving through the confined space before ascending a wooden ladder. As the character emerges, the environment shifts abruptly to a bright, sunlit deck where the camera glides past railings and crew members toward the interior of the captain's quarters. Inside, the light softens into streaming beams that illuminate red curtains and scrolls, before the perspective pulls back through the doorway to leave the ship entirely. The scene finally expands into a wide shot of turquoise coastal waters, revealing two characters in a small rowboat approaching the anchored ship against a rocky shoreline.
